properties.name: app.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the application used in email links.

properties.name: app.mail.from
properties.description: From address used when sending emails.

properties.name: app.scheduler.timezone
properties.description: Timezone used by scheduled tasks (e.g. goal notification cron).

properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: HMAC secret used to sign JWT tokens. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 64.

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration-days
properties.description: JWT token validity in days. Defaults to 7.
